snippet.title: NebojŇ°a Vukanovińá: Povlańćim se iz svih razgovora sa opozicijom
snippet.description:
NebojŇ°a Vukanovińá, poslanik u Narodnoj skupŇ°tini Republike Srpske tokom razgovora u Danu uŇĺivo otkrio je Ň°ta je zamjerio DraŇ°ku Stanivukovińáu, gradonańćelniku Banjaluke. Poruńćio je i prvom ńćovjeku Srbije Aleksandru Vuńćińáu da, ako je Srbin i patriota, prestane podrŇĺavati lidera SNSD-a Milorada Dodika. Vukanovińá je naveo kako ga ne zanimaju funkcije i da se povlańći iz svih razgovora sa opozicijom. "Kad se sve dogovore, nek onda dońĎu da razgovaraju sa mnom", dodao je.

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15‚Äô to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

snippet.title: FIBA EuroBasket 2022 Draw
snippet.description:
The 41st edition of the FIBA EuroBasket will take place in four countries, with Czech Republic, Georgia, Germany and Italy co-hosting Europe's flagship event in 2022.

The Group Phase of the event will be staged in Prague (CZE), Tbilisi (GEO), Cologne (GER) and Milan (ITA), with each of the cities hosting one group each.

The top four teams from each group will advance to the Final Phase in Germany's capital Berlin, where the European champions will be crowned in September 2022.

FIBA EuroBasket 2022 will take place from September 1-18, 2022.

snippet.title: Oko magazin: Palma i Marinika - biti ili ne biti
snippet.description:
Da li se politińćar u Jagodini bavi podvońĎenjem Ňĺena ili se ńćak i na ovakvim temama pravi politińćki rijaliti

Dragan Markovińá Palma i Marinika Tepińá su osobe o kojima se najviŇ°e govori proteklih sedam dana u Srbiji. Sve je pońćelo od njenih optuŇĺbi za podvońĎenje i pedofiliju u Jagodini. Dragan Markovińá tvrdi da u ovom sluńćaju nema ni svedoka ni Ňĺrtve, veńá se od svega pravi politińćki rijaliti. Marinika Tepińá juńće je dala izjavu u policiji u Jagodini i rekla da ima joŇ° 7 svedoka koji bi mogli da svedońće protiv Dragana Markovińáa Palme, ali da neńáe da otkrije njihov identitet dok ne dobiju zaŇ°titu.

1959. Fidel Kastro je predvodio Komunistińćku revoluciju na Kubi a njegov mlańĎi brat Raul bio je jedan od komandanata. 62 godine kasnije, 89-godiŇ°nji Raul Kastro povlańći se sa ńćela Komunistińćke partije Kube. Kakva ńáe da bude Kuba bez prezimena Kastro i da li Kuba od levińćarske inspiracije postaje zemlja na putu tranzicije ka kapitalizmu?

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papińá
Label and copyright: RTS
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.description:

Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug

Hvala horu "ńĆarolija" Ň°to su otpevali najllepŇ°e na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan

snippet.title: Emanet 169. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 169 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranŇĺman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äč‚Äč

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: I Spent 50 Hours Locked In An Art Store
snippet.description:
I can't believe we locked ourselves in an art store for 50 hours straight
Instant Influencer Announcement On @ZHC Crafts 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nQx2jYrsVDc

Subscribe right now and you might get picked to be in our next video to win money and custom items!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

To apply to be on ‚ÄúInstant Influencer with ZHC,‚ÄĚ submit your self-taped YouTube video in our casting portal here.
Tag your videos under the hashtag castmeZHC on YouTube to show the world you've got what it takes.
Uploaders must ensure their videos comply with the YouTube Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.
Uploaders must be over the age of 18 and must live in the United States. Sorry I wasn't able to make it international this time.
Uploaders that demonstrate strong expertise in the art space and a passion for educating and inspiring others will be considered for participation in the show.

snippet.title: DLZ i Milan Dumanovińá: Bunga-Bunga drŇĺava
snippet.description:
https://nova.rs/video/?ref=yt 
BivŇ°i, a DLZ dvojac se nada i buduńái, policajac Milan Dumanovińá gost je ove srede u prvom srpskom politińćkom isternu koji je doŇĺiveo i svoje mafijaŇ°ko izdanje.

Do ovakvog razvoja situacije je doŇ°lo iz prostog razloga Ň°to je naŇ°a drŇĺava debelo u kandŇĺama mafije, Ň°to potvrńĎuju reńći Dumanovińáa. DoŇĺivotni knez Jagodine organizuje Bunga-Bunga Ňĺurke, po svojevremenom priznanju aktuelne premijerke Srbije. Novinara, antifaŇ°istu, tuku Ň°tanglama u ranu zoru. Lokalni ńĎilkoŇ° i kum predsednika Srbije Darko GliŇ°ińá puni halu da bi dońćekao titulu prvaka Srbije u Ňĺenskoj odbojci, a na desetine ljudi dnevno umire od koronavirusa. I na to sve predsednik Srbije ne moŇĺe korak da napravi bez svoje senke i ikebane - Milorada Dodika.

PS. Vidojkovińá je raspsovao, Kulańćin zalizao, a Dumanovińá je sve referisao, kao na poligrafu.
